action.reasoning: Observation: The angle convention is INVERTED. Positive ang_vel increases the angle (turns away from human when angle>0). The robot never faces the human because the controller turns the wrong way. Analysis: Need ang_vel = -gain * angle (negative feedback). This is the root cause of all failures. Decision: Fix the sign in both predict.py and train.py, run a quick diagnostic to confirm, then submit eval.
